title: test_coverage=0.99, not a perfect 1.0
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.99 — one branch/line left uncovered across catalog/ (likely an unexercised guard such as loans.available() unknown-book path); all 14 tests pass
suggestion: Optional: add a test hitting the last uncovered guard to reach 1.0 coverage.

title: Reservation lookups are O(n) linear scans over a flat list
evidence: catalog/reservations.py:15 _for_book and :56 pop_next scan self.reservations linearly; fine at this scale but not indexed by book_id
suggestion: Optional: index reservations by book_id (dict of FIFO deques) if the catalog is expected to grow; not required by the spec.
